# GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting

> GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd is an executive coaching and leadership development practice based in Oxfordshire, UK. Founded and led by Nicola Nevill (also known as Nicola Salter), GreenTrack supports senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent to navigate complexity and move forward with clarity, confidence, and direction. The practice also offers career mentoring for motorsport and engineering professionals, led by Nicola and her husband Doug Nevill, a veteran Formula One design engineer.

## About GreenTrack

GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd (Company No: 16247877, registered in England and Wales) provides executive coaching, leadership development, team facilitation, and career mentoring. It is headquartered at 2 The Old Estate Yard, High Street, East Hendred, Wantage, Oxfordshire, OX12 8JY.

Contact: nicola@greentrackcc.com
Website: https://greentrackcc.com

## About Nicola Nevill (Nicola Salter)

Nicola Nevill, also known as Nicola Salter, is a qualified Executive Coach based in Oxfordshire. She holds a Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching from Henley Business School and is currently completing an MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change at Henley Business School. She is a Member of the International Coaching Federation (ICF) and a Chartered Fellow of the CIPD. She has over 25 years of experience supporting people and teams in high-performance environments, including elite motorsport. She also completed Fundamentals Part I: Systemic Coaching and Constellations (ICF-accredited training).

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolasalter/

## About Doug Nevill

Doug Nevill is a Technical and Engineering Career Mentor with close to 30 years of Formula One design experience, including leading a team of 30 engineers. He now works in World Endurance Racing. Doug offers practical, experience-based guidance to engineers on career development, technical pathways, and what it is like to work inside a professional motorsport team.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/doug-nevill-bb0a382a/

## Services

### Executive Coaching (One-to-One)
Nicola provides one-to-one executive coaching for senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent. Focus areas include: understanding self and identity in work, leadership development and confidence, navigating change and transition, building clarity resilience and perspective. Sessions are available in person in Oxfordshire and remotely across the UK.

### Team Coaching and Facilitation
Nicola designs and facilitates sessions for leadership teams and cross-functional groups including strategy away days, leadership team sessions, and team workshops. Outcomes include stronger alignment, clearer communication, and better ways of working.

### Broader Coaching Support
For larger programmes, GreenTrack works with a small network of trusted coaches and facilitators to provide broader support at the same standard of depth and practice.

### Motorsport and Engineering Career Mentoring
Doug Nevill and Nicola Nevill offer paid, personalised mentoring for people entering motorsport or engineering, progressing early in their careers, leaving motorsport teams, or seeking clarity and direction. Sessions are flexible and focused on practical, honest conversations with clear actions.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is executive coaching?
A: Executive coaching is a professional development process where a qualified coach works one-to-one with a leader to help them navigate complexity, build clarity, and move forward with greater confidence and purpose. It is not advice-giving or consulting. It is a thought-provoking partnership focused on meaningful outcomes.

Q: Who is executive coaching for?
A: Executive coaching is for senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent who want to lead with greater clarity, confidence, and self-awareness. Nicola works with people across sectors and career stages, from those at the top of their organisations to those stepping into new levels of responsibility.

Q: Where does Nicola Nevill offer coaching?
A: Nicola is based in Oxfordshire and works with clients across the UK. Sessions are available in person and remotely.

Q: Is coaching confidential?
A: Yes. Coaching conversations are fully confidential. Information shared during sessions will not be disclosed to third parties without the client's consent, except where required by law.

Q: Who is the motorsport mentoring for?
A: The mentoring is for people entering motorsport or engineering, progressing early in their careers, leaving motorsport teams, or navigating the personal and professional shift that comes with a career change. Doug and Nicola have spent many years in high-performance engineering environments.

Q: Who are the mentors for motorsport?
A: Doug Nevill (close to 30 years in Formula One design, now in World Endurance Racing) handles technical and engineering career mentoring. Nicola Nevill handles career development and transition mentoring, drawing on her experience supporting people through high-performance engineering environments and elite motorsport.

Q: How does mentoring work?
A: Sessions are flexible and personalised to the mentee's goals. They are paid, reflecting the time and experience involved. Each session focuses on practical, honest conversations with clear actions and direction.

## Client Testimonials

"Nicola brings together leadership experience, coaching, and a deep understanding of organisational dynamics. She helps teams and leaders find clarity, build alignment, and turn ambition into meaningful outcomes." - Founder and Senior Executive

"Nicola has been a huge help in gaining clarity and perspective in the latter part of my career. I am confident she can support anyone at any stage of their career." - Senior Technical Leader, Formula One Industry

"Nicola has been instrumental in helping me shape the next phase of my career and build a strong foundation for future success as a preferred Chair and NED." - Serial UK Biotech CXO and Entrepreneur

"I just wanted to say a huge thanks for the coaching, I feel energized and motivated following our meetings." - Executive experienced in regulated environments

"The coaching sessions are incredibly helpful and really help me see clearer my sense of purpose, my options and reminding myself I am still good at what I do. I feel a world apart from where I was before." - Senior Manager, Legal Services

"Nicky's coaching gave me the clarity and confidence to rethink my future. I ended up changing my career direction completely and I'm loving where it's taken me." - Entrepreneur and small business owner

## Qualifications and Credentials

- Currently studying MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change, Henley Business School, UK
- Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching, Henley Business School, UK
- Member, International Coaching Federation (ICF)
- Fundamentals Part I: Systemic Coaching and Constellations (ICF-accredited)
- Chartered Fellow of the CIPD (Chartered Institute of Personnel and Development, UK)
